callback.description: Only records where callback equals this value.

callback__contains.descriptions: Only records where callback includes each substring.

created_at.description: Only records where created_at equals this value.

created_at__gt.description: Only records where created_at is greater than this value.

created_at__gte.description: Only records where created_at is greater than or equal to this value.

created_at__lt.description: Only records where created_at is less than this value.

created_at__lte.description: Only records where created_at is less than or equal to this value.

email.description: Only records where email equals this value.

email__contains.descriptions: Only records where email includes each substring.

last.description: Reflected value from a previous response to obtain the next page of results.

order_by.description: Which field to order results by.

size.description: Maximum results to include in the response.

^profile_([A-Za-z]+)$.description: Only records where metadata field equals this value.

^profile_([A-Za-z]+)__contains$.description: Only records where metadata field contains one of these substrings.

^profile_([A-Za-z]+)__exists$.description: Only records where metadata field exists (true) or doesn't (false).

authn-flow-id.description: An ID for a login or signup flow

authn-flow-next.description: Information about next steps needed to complete a flow

authn-identity.description: The identity of a user or a service

authn-identity-nullable.description: The identity of a user or a service or empty

authn-provider-id.description: Mechanism for authenticating a user's identity

authn-social-provider-id.description: Social identity provider for authenticating a user's identity

authn-provider-ids.description: Mechanisms for authenticating a user's identity

authn-mfa-provider.description: Additional mechanism for authenticating a user's identity

authn-mfa-providers.description: Additional mechanisms for authenticating a user's identity

authn-mfa-totp-secret.description: TOTP QR code and secret returned during enrollment

authn-otp-send-provider.description: An email or SMS one-time-password provider

authn-timestamp-nullable.description: A time in ISO-8601 format or null

authn-token-list.description: A list of tokens and their information

require_mfa.description: True if the user must use MFA during authentication

verified.description: True if the user's email has been verified

disabled.description: True if the service administrator has disabled user account

authn-user-profile.description: A user profile as a collection of string properties

.*.description: New value, or null to delete the existing value

authn-social-id-and-secret.description: ID and secret for a social ID provider

require_mfa.description: Require the user to authenticate with MFA

authn-invite-infos.description: A list of pending user invitations
